name: dandori
description: 段取り — get every dish hot at once. From a menu of dishes (each a chain of timed steps that need your hands, a burner, or the oven) and a serving time, it schedules backwards under your real kitchen's limits (cooks, burners, oven) so nothing asks you to be in two places at once and everything lands by serving time — fragile dishes closest to the end. Tells you what to do, minute by minute. Zero dependencies, offline; the menu never leaves your device.
